falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match to bottom_2024_aug drops below 50%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity would invalidate the 78% match assumption, undermining the basis for the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Signal changes to BUY or SELL with 95% confidence
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear shift in signal direction would directly contradict the current HOLD state, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
